hooks.command: jq -c --rawfile checklist /Users/zachbeaudoin/projects/Langworthywatch/langworthy-tracker/.claude/scripts/fact-check-checklist.txt 'if (.tool_input.file_path // "") | test("content/fact-checks/(2026|2027|2028)-.*\\.md$") then {hookSpecificOutput: {hookEventName: "PostToolUse", additionalContext: $checklist}} else empty end'

f=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // ""'); echo "$f" | grep -qE 'content/fact-checks/(2026|2027|2028)-.*\.md$' || exit 0; [ -f "$f" ] || exit 0; out=$(python3 /Users/zachbeaudoin/projects/Langworthywatch/langworthy-tracker/.claude/scripts/prepublish_lint.py "$f" 2>&1); echo "$out" | grep -qE '== (BLOCK|HEDGE)' || exit 0; jq -cn --arg c "$out" '{hookSpecificOutput:{hookEventName:"PostToolUse",additionalContext:("prepublish_lint flagged provisional language in this fact-check (confirm-or-cut before flipping draft:false):
"+$c+"

Also audit claim→entity joins: run /claim-audit (recombination failure mode — a correct fact pinned to the WRONG program/district/vote/list).")}}'
